$comment: Bodhi workshops catalogue — single source of truth. To release a workshop, add a new object to "workshops". Content sourced from bodhiworkshops.com. Prices are INR. `image` is a filename in /public/images/workshops, `heroImage` in /public/images/workshop-detail. `listingFeatures`/`booking.chips` use icon keys (see ICONS in workshops.ts) and emojis. Set `schedule`, `facilitator`, or `faqs` to null to use the shared Bodhi defaults. Optional `startsAt` (ISO date) drives the detail-page countdown; omit it to use the default.

workshops.title: Self-Paced Face Yoga TTC
workshops.shortDescription: Explore the philosophy and fundamentals of Face Yoga and master facial exercises that tone, tighten, and rejuvenate naturally — with certification to teach globally.
workshops.subtitle: Explore the philosophy and fundamentals of Face Yoga and master facial exercises that tone, tighten, and rejuvenate naturally — with certification to teach globally.

booking.guaranteeNote: 🛡️ Certification to teach Face Yoga globally

about.body: Delve deep into the core principles and methodologies of Face Yoga — from philosophy and facial anatomy to practical teaching. Learn specialised techniques designed to tone, tighten, and rejuvenate facial muscles naturally.

features.title: Understanding Face Yoga
features.body: Discover the philosophy and fundamentals, intertwining facial exercises with the mind-body connection.

features.title: Facial Anatomy
features.body: Learn the art of facial anatomy and specialised techniques to tone, tighten, and rejuvenate.

features.title: Teaching Methodology
features.body: Master exercises, sequencing, and instruction to craft personalised routines for any goal.

benefits.title: Inside the Face Yoga TTC
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to practise, teach, and build a career in natural facial rejuvenation.

items.title: Face Yoga Techniques
items.body: Learn face yoga techniques for facial toning and natural rejuvenation.

items.title: Natural Anti-Aging
items.body: Focus on natural anti-aging methods — no needles, no surgery.

items.title: Guiding Others
items.body: Get practical training on guiding and instructing others effectively.

items.title: Global Certification
items.body: Earn certification that qualifies you to teach Face Yoga worldwide.

items.title: Built for Professionals
items.body: Designed for wellness and beauty professionals expanding their offering.

items.title: Facial Anatomy
items.body: Understand facial anatomy and specialised techniques for each area of the face.

items.title: 🧘 Understanding Face Yoga
items.body: Philosophy and fundamentals of Face Yoga and the mind-body connection.

items.title: 💪 Facial Anatomy
items.body: Specialised techniques designed to tone, tighten, and rejuvenate facial muscles naturally.

items.title: 🎯 Practical Application
items.body: A diverse array of facial exercises and routines, tailored to specific facial areas.

items.title: 🎓 Teaching Methodology
items.body: Sequencing and instructional methods to craft personalised routines for any goal.

faqs.question: What do I need to take this course?
faqs.answer: Just a mobile phone or laptop, a good internet connection, a quiet space to practise and watch the lectures, and a desire to complete the training program.

faqs.question: Will I Get a Recording if I Can't Attend Live?
faqs.answer: Yes — sessions are recorded and you'll get access to the replay so you can revisit any segment as often as you like during your access window.

faqs.question: Will I Receive a Certificate?
faqs.answer: Yes — this teacher training includes certification on completion, so you can confidently teach what you've learned.

faqs.question: Is There Support if I Get Stuck?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. You get seamless online personal chat support to resolve all your doubts throughout the program.

about.body: This class helps you develop a regular fitness and wellness routine to achieve your goals — whether gaining weight, losing weight, or reducing stress. It also improves your stamina, strength, and flexibility, with a trainer to assist you closely and answer your questions.

workshops.title: Happy Weight Loss Program
workshops.shortDescription: For those committed to sustainable weight loss and transforming their health — through mindful eating, daily movement, hydration, and accountability.
workshops.subtitle: Specially designed for those deeply committed to achieving sustainable weight loss and transforming their health — through mindful eating, daily movement, and accountability.

booking.guaranteeNote: 🛡️ A lifestyle transformation, not a short-term fix

about.body: The Happy Weight Loss Program is specially designed for those who are deeply committed to achieving sustainable weight loss and transforming their health — through mindful eating, daily movement, hydration, rest, and accountability.

features.title: Mindful Eating
features.body: Be conscious of your food choices, following the nutrition guidelines provided.

features.title: Daily Movement
features.body: Engage in the recommended exercises and stay active every day.

features.title: Accountability
features.body: Track your progress, join group discussions, and seek support when needed.

benefits.title: How the Program Works
benefits.subtitle: Sustainable weight loss takes consistency. Here's what the journey asks of you — and gives back.

items.title: Consistency Is Key
items.body: Attend all sessions and follow the program with dedication.

items.title: Mindful Eating
items.body: Stay conscious of your food choices, following the nutrition guidelines.

items.title: Daily Movement
items.body: Engage in the recommended exercises and physical activities.

items.title: Hydration & Rest
items.body: Prioritise enough water and proper sleep for optimal results.

items.title: Accountability Matters
items.body: Track your progress, join group discussions, and seek support.

items.title: Commit to Change
items.body: Embrace the program as a lasting lifestyle change — no quick fixes.
